description: Search for tools by name and return their names and descriptions. Use this to discover tools before enabling them with enable_tools. The query is matched as a regular expression against each tool name.

query.description: A regular expression to match against available tool names (e.g. "logs", "pagerduty.*", "^workbench_").

max_results.description: The maximum number of matching tools to return. Defaults to 5 when omitted.
